subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness in the Kingdom of Utterance that there is none other God but Him, and He Who speaketh is verily the Preserved Tablet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله فی ملکوت البیان انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ینطق انه لهو اللوح المحفوظ
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @knowledge; recognition of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
